title: Voice
description: A voice available for text-to-speech synthesis in the Neuphonic platform, either a standard voice or a user-cloned voice.

tags.description: Tags associated with the voice for categorization.

lang_code.description: Language code for the voice (e.g., en, es, de, fr, ur, ja, ko, zh, pt).

is_cloned.description: Whether this is a user-created cloned voice (true) or a standard Neuphonic voice (false).
